issues.issue: Business logic flaw: Journal entries are generated with hardcoded 0 totals and no lines.
issues.fix: Implement logic to fetch payroll components/data and create associated PayrollJournalEntryLine records within the same transaction.

issues.issue: Missing RBAC checks on state-changing endpoints (post/reverse).

issues.fix: Add an 'order_by' parameter to the query to allow sorting by date or entry_number.
Change "Retrieved" to something descriptive like 'Salary journal entries retrieved successfully'

improvement_hints_for_agent: Always ensure state-changing endpoints (POST/PUT/PATCH) have explicit RBAC checks.
Business logic for 'Generate' endpoints must include the creation of child records (lines) to ensure data integrity.
List endpoints should support sorting (e.g., created_at DESC) to be production-ready.
Avoid hardcoding status strings; use the imported Enums/Constants.
